evidence_paragraphs.snippet: Kevan has begun to resent the demands of Mace Tyrell as Cersei did, but he realises he cannot openly oppose them; Tyrell and his bannerman [Randyll Tarly](wiki:Randyll_Tarly) have both brought armies...
